data.body: ADR DRAFTED (2026-07-13): docs/adr/0046-security-posture-and-accepted-limitations.md — records the assurance model (FISMA Moderate target; certification = process-followed + no-blocking-issues, issued from a single Gerrit-authenticated controlled environment) and frames the assessment findings as FIVE accepted limitations (L1 key-validity-rests-on-access-control, L2 no-transparency-log, L3 TOFU-authorship, L4 single-environment/no-threshold, L5 process-not-correctness), each with its bounding control + authority tier + tracked deferred-hardening idea ticket. Deferred-hardening ideas: 2422 (anti-rollback), 4e1d (transparency-log posture), 5100 (threshold/runbook), all linked relates_to this epic. Draft is in the working tree; not yet landed via Gerrit. When op-cert ADR child 6a89 is written it should cross-reference 0046 (L2/L4 are op-cert-scoped).
